# Template Info

I've crated this issue template due to plenty of reports:
- having no sense,
- not providing any necessary debug data,

## Reminder

The project is supposed to be used for storing private data, within private network. If you are reporting any kind of issues such us:
- unauthorized user can upload malicious code

then in 90% of cases I'll just close the issue, because you are violating the main idea of this project.

If you really must have access to the project externally then it's up to you to configured the security on the network / os level.

## Description

- double check if your reports can be recreated with the data that you provided,
- always write the steps necessary for recreating the issue,
- provide screenshots if possible,
- security issues are in most case going to be ignored because I'm just tired an annoyed of weird reports that make no sense,
- feel free to drop a pull request 

## And most important

I'm only spending on the project like 30-60min per day - sometimes lesson, or no time at all for few days - so I'm not always going to answer right away etc.
